allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://app.ela-ia.com/api/v1/chatbot/metadatas -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -H 'Referer: https://www.campingsaintamand.com/elaia-metadatas/' -d domain=www.campingsaintamand.com -w '\\n---HTTP:%{http_code} TIME:%{time_total}s SIZE:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('template:', d.get\('template'\)\); print\('parent:', d.get\('parent'\)\); print\('status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\)")
